  "findings": [
    "Critical locate markings, labels, or clearance dimensions are outside the photographic frame",
    "Unable to visually verify compliance with 811/CGA marking standards from the single available angle"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Request additional photographs showing the complete layout of the locate marks and clearance dimensions",
    "Perform a physical site walk to verify locate accuracy and alignment with engineered drawings before excavation begins"
  ],
  "rationale": "The work is at the rough-complete stage, but a single-angle photograph obscures the critical labels and clearance dimensions required to verify compliance with 811/CGA best practices. A definitive pass/fail decision cannot be made without complete visual or physical verification of the markings.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Section 3 (Locating and Marking)",
    "OSHA 29 CFR 1926.651(b) (Underground Installations)"
  ]
